LABEL: Managed Care Plan Reimbursement Type Category Code 

DESCRIPTION: Managed Care Plan Reimbursement Type Category Code — Aggregated categories based on the 
managed care plan reimbursement type code values (MC_PLAN_REIMBRSMT_TYPE_CD); most recent 
in the calendar year.
